title: Opening for Production Engineer at ABB India

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at ABB India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Production Engineer looking for your next big career move? ABB India in Jaipur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About ABB India:
ABB India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ABB India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
